item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Rich mushroom stroganoff with pasta, also available as whole grain and glutenfree, topped with freshly chopped parsley. Green salad and apple vinaigrette onthe side (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Nicaraguan vegan arroz a la valenciana with turmeric rice, also available asbrown rice, filled with spices, vegetables and soy protein. Served with blackbeans in sofrito and topped with spring onions. Fresh cucumber and dill saladon the side (13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Rich baked egg dish with potatoes and grilled peppers, seasoned with freshherbs. Served with creamy aioli (2+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pasta pesto with a rich pesto of basil, parsley, seeds and cheese, coatinggrilled vegetables and legumes in every bite (1+6+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Vegetable hash with beans and mushrooms, topped with egg and crisp rye breadcrunch. Pickled beetroot, avocado ranch dressing and fresh herb salad on theside (1+2+6+8+13+15)
